hero.title: The first Chilean Litigation Fund with presence in LATAM
hero.description: We finance expenses derived from commercial litigation and arbitration, assuming risks as non-recourse financing.

home.rapaNui: Hakamana is a Rapa Nui word meaning "to give power".
home.equipoDesc: Legal due diligence is key, which is why lawyers with considerable experience make investment decisions.
home.queHacemosDesc: We finance expenses derived from litigation and arbitration, assuming risks as non-recourse financing.
home.queHacemosOutcome: If the case is won, the Fund recovers the investment plus the agreed return. If the case is lost, the Fund loses the entire investment.
home.ctaDesc: We evaluate your case confidentially and without obligation. Our team is available to analyze your situation.

about.heroDesc: The first Chilean Litigation Fund with presence in LATAM
about.rapaNui: Hakamana is a Rapa Nui word meaning "to give power".

team.heroDesc: Legal due diligence is key, which is why lawyers with considerable litigation experience and a professionally diverse Investment Committee make investment decisions.

whatWeDo.heroDesc: We finance commercial litigation and arbitration with exhaustive analysis
whatWeDo.sinRecursoDesc: If the case is lost, the Fund assumes the total loss
whatWeDo.confidencialDesc: Rigorous analysis and confidential handling of each case
whatWeDo.expertosDesc: Investment committee with extensive legal and financial experience

faq.heroDesc: Answers to the most common questions about litigation funds

contact.heroDesc: We evaluate your case confidentially and without obligation

metadata.homeTitle: Hakamana - Litigation Fund | First Chilean Litigation Fund
metadata.homeDesc: Hakamana is the first Chilean Litigation Fund with presence in LATAM. We finance commercial litigation and arbitration. Non-recourse financing.
